indications.text:
Iclusig (ponatinib) is a kinase inhibitor indicated for the:
• Treatment of adult patients with chronic phase, accelerated phase, or blast phase chronic myeloid leukemia (CML) or
Ph+ ALL for whom no other tyrosine kinase inhibitor (TKI) therapy is indicated.
